description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a large central turret with a prominent cannon and a secondary machine gun mounted on top. The hull is robust, with sloped armor plating covering the front, sides, and rear, and multiple hatches and periscopes visible on the turret and body. The vehicle is equipped with six large road wheels on each side, supporting continuous metal tracks for all-terrain mobility. The exterior is painted in a camouflage pattern with shades of tan, brown, and black, and a long radio antenna extends from the turret. Additional details include storage boxes, external fuel tanks, and various equipment mounted on the hull and turret. The vehicle's design is optimized for urban and battlefield environments, providing both offensive and defensive capabilities.
description: A heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret, main cannon, and camouflage paint, designed for urban and battlefield use. Features include sloped armor, machine gun mount, and multiple external equipment attachments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, main cannon, and machine gun mount on the turret, with the radio antenna visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous tracks, six large road wheels, and external storage boxes along the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, external fuel tanks, and rear hatches, with the turret and antenna extending above.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional equipment mounted on the hull, the full length of the cannon, and the side camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret and one machine gun mount on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; turret and hull both reinforced.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Tan, brown, and black irregular camouflage pattern with blended, organic shapes.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblem on the turret side; no other visible numbers or insignia.
